_meta.keyKnowledge: We apply production elements like lighting, costume and sound to enhance the meaning of our dances.

_source.w: We apply production elements like lighting, costume and sound to enhance the meaning of our dances.
y: Production elements transform a dance from a movement sequence into a complete performance experience.
Understanding how lighting, sound and costume work helps us create a stronger impact on our audience.
Working with production elements teaches us to think like both artists and designers.
eg: We experiment with lighting colour and intensity to create mood in our dance performance.
We select costumes that reflect the theme and style of our choreography.
We design a soundscape that supports and enhances the narrative of our dance.
We consider how staging and set design affect the audience's experience.
We use projection or digital media alongside live performance to add layers of meaning.
We evaluate how different production choices change the audience's interpretation of our work.
